FINAL_RESULT:
  UUID: 9777237f-f5a8-4370-972c-b604eb437046
  PREDICTED_SMILES: CC(C)C(NC(=O)C(Cc1ccccc1)NC(=O)OC(C)(C)C)C(=O)OC(C)(C)C
  CONFIDENCE: 0.85
  REASON_BRIEF: The NMR data shows characteristic signals for a phenylalanine residue (benzylic CH2 at 3.09 ppm, α-CH at 4.70 ppm, phenyl protons at 7.15-7.27 ppm), a valine residue (isopropyl methyl doublet at 1.44 ppm), two tert-butyl groups (singlets at 1.38 and 1.41 ppm), and two NH protons (amide NH at 6.81 ppm and carbamate NH at 4.97 ppm), consistent with Boc-Phe-Val-O-tBu. The molecular formula discrepancy is likely an error in the provided data.
